title: UnzipFile Task
description: Extract files from a ZIP archive (local path or URL)

inputs.description: UnzipFile inputs — provide either filePath or fileUrl

filePath.description: Local file path to ZIP archive (from saveToFile or previous step)

fileUrl.description: URL to ZIP archive (file://, http://, https://)

filePattern.description: Glob-style pattern to filter extracted files (e.g. '*.csv', 'data_*.json'). If omitted, all files returned.

outputs.description: Outputs: Files (string[] — full paths to extracted files), Count (int — number of matched files)
